description_long: This sconce features a central cylindrical stem that extends vertically from a ceiling mount, with five evenly spaced arms radiating outward in a star-like pattern. Each arm supports a spherical globe, likely made of frosted or translucent glass, which serves as the light diffuser. The globes are attached to the ends of gently curved metal arms, giving the fixture a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The stem and arms appear to be constructed from a metallic material, possibly brushed steel or aluminum, with a smooth, slightly reflective finish. The overall design is sleek and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms. The fixture is intended to be mounted on the ceiling, providing ambient illumination in urban interiors such as lobbies, hallways, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern ceiling-mounted sconce with five spherical glass globes on curved metal arms radiating from a central stem. The design is sleek, symmetrical, and minimalist, emphasizing geometric shapes.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five glass globes evenly spaced and the central stem extending from the ceiling mount.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the depth of the arms and the staggered arrangement of the globes around the central axis.
description_view_2: Rear view with the central stem and three globes visible in front, two partially obscured behind.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the spatial distribution of the globes.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and geometric symmetry. Its smooth metal arms and spherical glass globes evoke a contemporary aesthetic with subtle industrial influences.
